title: Workforce planning
summary: 9609 AS workforce planning — labour demand forecasting and skills gap analysis.
learningObjectives: Analyse methods of forecasting labour needs.
Evaluate internal vs external labour supply.

simpleExplanation.title: Right people, right time
simpleExplanation.summary: Workforce planning aligns staffing with business strategy, avoiding shortages or costly overstaffing.
steps: Audit current workforce skills and age profile.
Forecast demand from growth or technology change.
Gap analysis: needed vs available skills.

sections.content: **Workforce planning** (2.1.2) is part of **HRM**. Link to **business objectives** and **labour turnover**.
